data.content: Retakes view now keeps each row collapsed by default and uses a per-beat disclosure control instead of a page-level toggle. Description stays visible; expanding a row reveals steps, notes, and handoff capsules together. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/retakes-pagination-layout.test.ts, bun run test, bun run build.
